content:
Hi i'm jamal my native language is not English,but I have worked with academic writing recently due to my field of study, now I am focusing on proofreading and translate ENG > TH,
Glad to be part of this looking forward to working with you guys.

Hi everyone! Please call me Ani~

I'm the translator for Vietnamese 🇻🇳 . Although Eng is not my native, I have been living abroad for awhile just enough to ensure my literacy is capable for this project.  <:blushy:1233560290818265240> 
I love reading novels and stuff but I have always been left unsatisfied. Most likely, it's due to the urge of imagination, to create something from imagination, to play with the words artistically. <:wowblushcute:867469934837628969> 
Because of that, I've started writing my own novels, putting my emotions meticulously into every words to craft the most desired piece i have ever dreamed.  💖 
With those experiences, although non-professional, I'm eager to deliver this wonderful world of Morimens to my fellow Vietnamese who are unable to comprehend it in English.<:WorryBlush:832252858685718529> <:WorryBlush:832252858685718529> <:WorryBlush:832252858685718529>  Oh gosh everything in Morimens is just so peak 😭 

Morimens deserves more recognition. And this is my first step to make it come true <:AniBlewHeart:1140987500681244743> <:AniBlewHeart:1140987500681244743>
